description_long: This object is a rugged, military-style radio receiver with a dark green and black exterior, featuring a prominent keypad and digital display on its front panel. The device is equipped with a coiled cord connecting a detachable handset, which rests on top of the main unit. The front face displays several buttons, rotary knobs, and indicator lights, suggesting multiple control and tuning options. The sides of the radio show reinforced metal bars and mounting brackets, likely for portability and protection. The rear section appears to house large battery compartments or power modules, with visible latches and covers. The overall construction is robust, with a utilitarian design suitable for field or urban deployment.
description: A rugged, dark green and black radio receiver with a keypad, digital display, and a coiled handset, designed for field or urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the keypad, digital display, control knobs, and the coiled handset resting on top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the metal bars, mounting brackets, and the profile of the handset and cord.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large battery compartments or power modules with visible covers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing additional mounting hardware and the coiled cord, with less detail on the controls.
